verdict_reasoning: GPRC5D is a Class C G protein-coupled receptor (GPCR). GPCRs are 7-transmembrane proteins with extracellular N-terminus, 3 extracellular loops, and 3 intracellular loops. The multipass transmembrane architecture guarantees stable outer-leaflet exposure and is the canonical substrate for extracellular binder engagement (antibodies, small molecules, peptides). Membership in the GPCR family establishes surface accessibility regardless of functional annotation status.
